ocr.text: In the rapidly evolving landscape of healthcare, Abbott Laboratories has positioned itself as a leader in the medical device
sector, particularly within North America. The company’s commitment to innovation and quality has significantly influenced its
revenue streams across various segments, which underscores its strategic focus on addressing critical health challenges. This
report seeks to provide a comprehensive overview of Abbott’s medical device revenue by segment, highlighting the
performance of key categories such as Diabetes Care and Diagnostics. The Diabetes Care segment, which includes a range of
glucose monitoring devices and insulin delivery systems, has demonstrated remarkable resilience and growth, contributing
CAD 120.3 million to the company’s overall revenue. This figure reflects a 3.8% increase from the previous fiscal year,
emphasizing the rising demand for effective diabetes management solutions amid a growing patient population.
Segment  Amount($M)  YoYChange(%)  MarketShare(%)  Cardiovascular  150.5  5.2  25.0
DiabetesCare  120.3  3.8  20.0  Diagnostics  98.7  4.5  16.5
Neuromodulation  75.4  6.1  12.5  Nutrition  60.2  2.9  10.0
DiabetesCare  30.1  1.5  7.5  Diagnostics  24.5  1.8  6.0
Neuromodulation  15.5  3.2  50.0  Nutrition  9.8  0.9  4.2
TotalYoYChange  4.3  30.1  7.3  TotalMarketShare  100.0  11.0  7.8
Additionally, the Diagnostics segment, which encompasses a wide array of testing solutions for various medical conditions,
generated CAD 98.7 million, representing a 4.5% growth as compared to the last reporting period. This increase is indicative of
the heightened focus on early diagnosis and preventive care, which are paramount in improving patient outcomes and reducing

long-term healthcare costs. 

As healthcare professionals and organizations increasingly prioritize technology-driven solutions,
Abbott’s diverse portfolio positions it favorably to capture market share and meet the evolving needs of patients and providers
alike. The data presented in the forthcoming table not only illustrates the revenue figures for each segment but also highlights
the underlying trends that are shaping the medical device landscape in North America. By understanding the dynamics within
these segments, stakeholders can better assess Abbott’s performance and its strategic initiatives aimed at maintaining

competitive advantage in a challenging market. 

Moreover, the implications of these revenue figures extend beyond mere
numbers; they reflect Abbott’s ongoing commitment to research and development, as well as its ability to adapt to shifting
regulatory environments and emerging health trends. As the company continues to innovate and expand its offerings, the
insights gained from the revenue by segment analysis will be essential for informing future strategic decisions and investment
opportunities. With a robust focus on enhancing patient care through advanced medical technologies, Abbott Laboratories
remains at the forefront of the healthcare sector, poised for sustained growth and impact.
